meaning: adj.非赶时髦派的,不谙时髦的,不符合集团其他成员所遵循的习俗的
examples: The motley cast of characters includes a dodgy, pockmarked contractor (Mark Lee), a hopelessly unhip coffee-shop boy (Henry Thia) and tattooed loan sharks, all of them relentlessly chasing money.
The actor scored big in 2003 when he landed the lead role on the decidedly unhip NCIS. The show has been a huge hit and eight years latest it can still attract a whopping 20 million viewers.
